svg.title: SQL EDA Project Roadmap
svg.desc: Full roadmap for SQL data cleaning and visualisation project across 5 phases

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me all SQL queries for Phase 1: Data Profiling')
g.text: Row count · column types · NULL counts · value ranges

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me all SQL queries for Phase 2: Handling Missing Values')
g.text: NULL detection · IS NULL filters · COALESCE fixes · imputation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me all SQL queries for Phase 3: Data Quality Checks')
g.text: Duplicates · invalid values · type issues · inconsistent formats

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me all SQL queries for Phase 4: Business Analysis Queries')
g.text: Aggregations · top products · discount analysis · stock insights

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me all SQL queries for Phase 5: Visualisation Prep')
g.text: Summary views · pivot-ready queries · Tableau / Power BI export

svg.text: Click any phase above to get all SQL queries for that phase
